same-name reference screenshot must not inherit the default drawing template frame/titleblock

warnings.msg: Reference-intent dimension targets are active; skip bulk model dimensions to avoid AutoDimension-style slanted callout stacks.
同名参考图未使用剖视图；已按参考图跳过自动剖视，保持视图数量一致
Reference-intent path reached the DisplayDim floor without running the generic dimension sidecar.
PNG 由 run_manager PDF→PyMuPDF 回退生成

dimension_intent_groups.label: left and right end offsets
dimension_intent_groups.source_reference_rule: keep end-offset dimensions outside the long top view

dimension_intent_groups.label: hole diameter and center locations
dimension_intent_groups.source_reference_rule: group hole callouts into the compact right-side leader lane seen in the same-name reference

dimension_intent_groups.label: right-side projected view size and small-feature location
dimension_intent_groups.source_reference_rule: dimension the small projection without replacing it with a named view

dimension_intent_groups.label: radius/chamfer/thread callouts when detected
dimension_intent_groups.source_reference_rule: add only when geometry/reference notes prove the feature is present

latest_manual_findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot was inspected side by side with the reference image.
The new run improved live DrawingView recovery and produced current-run SLDDRW/PDF/DXF/PNG artifacts, but visual acceptance still fails.
Layout scale solving moved in the wrong direction and exhausted the scale ladder; the final generated views are much smaller/bunched compared with the reference.
DisplayDim count reached 21, but the visual result remains unreadable/crowded and semantic target coverage still regressed after the final arrange pass.
API/reference metrics are supporting evidence only; the UI screenshot review is the final gate and remains FAIL.
ui_correction_evidence.latest_manual_required_correction: Fix the 006 reference-outline scale solver so it chooses larger, reference-matching outlines instead of shrinking through 1:10/1:20/1:50; preserve hole_diameter and hole_pitch through final arrange/reopen; then regenerate title block and manufacturing notes in the compact reference style before another locked 006-only CAD rerun.

required_notes: 总长和装配关键尺寸为重点检验尺寸。
optional_notes: 运输和装夹过程不得弯曲变形。
